indicators.name: Sensor Contradiction
indicators.summary: FLAGGED — 4 sensor/GPS contradiction(s) detected. Physical sensor data contradicts reported GPS movement.
evidence: SENSOR CONTRADICTION at 2024-03-15 03:59:50 UTC: GPS implies 622 km/h travel, but Activity Recognition reports 'STILL'. Device was physically stationary while GPS moved 290.2 km.
STEP COUNTER CONTRADICTION: GPS shows 580.7 km travel, but step counter recorded only 43 steps (~0.0 km). Device was physically stationary.
ACCELEROMETER CONTRADICTION at 2024-03-15 03:32:00 UTC: GPS implies 622 km/h, but accelerometer shows stationary (variance=0.000, mean=9.82 m/s²). Phone was sitting still while GPS 'moved' 290.2 km.
ACCELEROMETER CONTRADICTION at 2024-03-15 04:02:00 UTC: GPS implies 587 km/h, but accelerometer shows stationary (variance=0.000, mean=9.82 m/s²). Phone was sitting still while GPS 'moved' 290.1 km.
